args.code:
import pandas as pd, json
cases = pd.DataFrame(var_call_h06Vj1wmZgBsPf0UKci31mqZ)
accts = pd.DataFrame(var_call_yHX2SH6hbM9VO528yxbEVXWd)
cases['clean_acct'] = cases['accountid'].str.replace('#','', regex=False)
accts['clean_id'] = accts['Id'].str.replace('#','', regex=False)
merged = cases.merge(accts[['clean_id','ShippingState']], left_on='clean_acct', right_on='clean_id', how='left')
state_avg = merged.groupby('ShippingState', dropna=True)['avg_days'].astype(float).mean().sort_values()
best_state = state_avg.index[0] if len(state_avg)>0 else None
result = json.dumps(best_state)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(result)

args.code:
import pandas as pd, json
cases = pd.DataFrame(var_call_h06Vj1wmZgBsPf0UKci31mqZ)
accts = pd.DataFrame(var_call_yHX2SH6hbM9VO528yxbEVXWd)
cases['clean_acct'] = cases['accountid'].str.replace('#','', regex=False)
accts['clean_id'] = accts['Id'].str.replace('#','', regex=False)
merged = cases.merge(accts[['clean_id','ShippingState']], left_on='clean_acct', right_on='clean_id', how='left')
merged['avg_days'] = merged['avg_days'].astype(float)
state_avg = merged.dropna(subset=['ShippingState']).groupby('ShippingState')['avg_days'].mean().sort_values()
best_state = state_avg.index[0] if len(state_avg)>0 else None
import json
result = json.dumps(best_state)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(result)

val_args.code:
import pandas as pd, json
cases = pd.DataFrame(var_call_h06Vj1wmZgBsPf0UKci31mqZ)
accts = pd.DataFrame(var_call_yHX2SH6hbM9VO528yxbEVXWd)
cases['clean_acct'] = cases['accountid'].str.replace('#','', regex=False)
accts['clean_id'] = accts['Id'].str.replace('#','', regex=False)
merged = cases.merge(accts[['clean_id','ShippingState']], left_on='clean_acct', right_on='clean_id', how='left')
merged['avg_days'] = merged['avg_days'].astype(float)
state_avg = merged.dropna(subset=['ShippingState']).groupby('ShippingState')['avg_days'].mean().sort_values()
best_state = state_avg.index[0] if len(state_avg)>0 else None
import json
result = json.dumps(best_state)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(result)
